title: Land of Confusion
why_this_song: Land of Confusion by Genesis (1986) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 6 times; first heard in: "There's too many men, too many people"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Well, this is the world we live in (oh-oh-oh)"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Well, this is the world we live in (oh-oh-oh)"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "And these are the hands we're given (oh-oh-oh)"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "And these are the hands we're given (oh-oh-oh)"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Use them and let's start trying (oh-oh-oh)
To make it a place worth living in
Ooh, Superman, where are you now
Use them and let's start trying (oh-oh-oh)
To make it a place worth fighting for
This is the world we live in (oh-oh-oh)
And these are the names we've given (oh-oh-oh)

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "many" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "many" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "world" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "world" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I must've dreamed a thousand dreams
Ooh, Superman, where are you now
I won't be coming home tonight

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Been haunted by a million screams
But there's not much love to go around

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Land of Confusion" was released in 1986. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Land of Confusion" foi lançada em 1986. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
